extract: Samurott (Japanese: ダイケンキ Daikenki) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Dewott starting at level 36. It is the final form of Oshawott. In Hisui, Samurott has a dual-type Water/Dark regional form. It evolves from Dewott starting at level 36. It is the final form of Oshawott in the Hisui region.
